title: Bio Memory Rust Lab 01: Chemical Formulas as Data Tables
description:
Short classroom clip from Bio Memory Rust Lab. It shows how formulas such as H2O, CH4, and C2H6O preserve element counts before students model atoms and molecules in Rust.

title: Bio Memory Rust Lab 02: From Formula to Molecule Graph
description:
Short classroom clip from Bio Memory Rust Lab. It turns C2H6O into an atom-and-bond graph so students can see why counts and connectivity are different kinds of data.

description:
